job.title: FT Accounts Payable Associate
job.description:
Job Title: FT Accounts Payable Associate About the Role • Manage and process invoices from vendors and suppliers, ensuring accuracy and timely payments. • Analyze accounts payable transactions, resolving any discrepancies or issues that may arise.
The Accounts Payable Associate will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records and reports. This includes tracking expenses and identifying areas for cost savings. Taking care of our team members with medical, dental & vision benefits as well as 401k match program to help them thrive in all aspects of their life!

job.title: Senior Accountant
job.description:
About Barron Lighting Group
Barron Lighting Group values integrity, innovation, quality and flexibility. Our employees are committed to delivering world-class service when our customers need it. Senior Accountant Role Summary
The Senior Accountant plays a key role in supporting the Accounting Department by ensuring accurate, timely and compliant financial records and reporting. With 5+ years of general accounting experience, this position assists with financial statement preparation, reconciliation and review of balance sheet accounts.

job.title: Entry Level Tax Associate
job.description:
Description:
Joining the Jackson Hewitt team as an Entry Level Tax Associate means becoming a vital resource for your local community during the busiest time of the year. We believe that great service starts with great people, not just a background in math or accounting. In this role, you will guide clients through the complexities of tax season with a focus on empathy and clarity. Whether you are looking to launch a career in finance or simply want a seasonal role that offers professional growth and a flexible schedule, we provide the tools and supportive environment necessary to help you thrive from day one.
Qualifications: • A natural "people person" who enjoys solving problems and providing top-tier service. • Clear communication skills, with the ability to break down complex details for others. • Tech-savvy enough to handle standard office software and learn our internal filing systems. • The ability to keep a cool head and stay organized when the office pace picks up. • A high school diploma or equivalent, plus an eagerness to master new tax regulations.
Benefits: • Hourly pay that rewards your hard work, supplemented by performance-based bonuses. • Free, industry-leading training to get you fully certified in tax preparation. • We cover the costs for your PTIN registration and EA certification study resources. • Work-life balance through adaptable scheduling that fits your lifestyle. • Exclusive corporate perks and a variety of health and wellness benefits. • Continuous learning opportunities to keep your skills sharp for future seasons. • Discounted tax preparation services for your close friends and family.
Responsibilities: • Meeting one-on-one with clients to understand their unique financial situations. • Entering data precisely into our tax software to ensure accurate and timely filings. • Cultivating a loyal client base by providing a dependable and friendly experience. • Partnering with your local team to maintain a smooth and efficient office wor

job.title: Accounting Manager
job.description:
Accounting Manager
Lead accounting operations and ensure accurate financial reporting in support of renewable energy projects and corporate activities. • Supervise accounting staff, strengthen internal controls, and partner with cross-functional teams to manage day-to-day accounting functions. • Maintain financial integrity, supporting operational scalability as the organization grows.

job.title: Accountant
job.description:
Job Summary of Accountant:
Our store employees work many roles - from Accountant. As a store employee, you're also responsible for merchandising product, monitoring inventory and keeping the store looking its best. It's an opportunity to get more out of your career and grow in an exciting environment. Their hard work makes it possible to uphold our company philosophy, providing quality products at the best possible price. Their smiles and pleasant demeanors keep customers coming back time and time again.Our store employees are the face of the ALDI shopping experience.
Benefits of Accountant: • We offer a flexible schedule, • Insurance benefits • Fast paced exciting work place where you can refine your skills.
Responsibilities of Accountant: • Conducts customer transactions, fulfills general cleaning obligations, and arranges merchandise presentations and shelf restocking in an orderly fashion • Provide exceptional customer support by helping clients navigate their shopping journey • Work together with colleagues and maintain open communication with the store management group

job.title: Accounting Manager
job.description:
Job Title: Accounting Manager
The Accounting Manager is responsible for overseeing core accounting operations and ensuring accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting in support of renewable energy projects.
This role manages day-to-day accounting functions, supervises accounting staff, strengthens internal controls, and partners cross-functionally to support project accounting, close processes, and audits. • Lead a team of accountants by providing guidance training performance feedback development support journal entries account reconciliations month end year end close processes ensuring accurate timely financial reporting in accordance with GAAP company policies regulatory requirements managing reviewing balance sheet income statement reconciliations investigating resolving variances coordinating activities related to renewable energy projects including cost tracking accruals collaboration with project teams supporting the preparation of financial statements management reports adhoc analyses leadership maintaining strengthening internal controls audit readiness accuracy partnering AP AR tax procurement finance teams to ensure endtoend alignment assisting internal external audits documentation explanations responses driving continuous improvement opportunities process optimization automation scalability within operations ERP system enhancements testing implementation process documentation

job.title: Accounting Manager
job.description:
Accounting Manager Role
The Accounting Manager at Atlantica plays a key role in maintaining financial integrity and supporting operational scalability as the organization grows. Key Responsibilities

job.title: Accounting Manager
job.description:
As the Accounting Manager at Atlantica, you will oversee core accounting operations and ensure accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting in support of renewable energy projects and corporate activities. This role manages day-to-day accounting functions, supervises accounting staff, strengthens internal controls, and partners cross-functionally to support project accounting close processes. • Lead a team of accountants providing guidance training performance feedback development support • Oversight general ledger activities journal entries account reconciliations month end year end close processes ensuring GAAP compliance company policies regulatory requirements • Maintain strengthen internal controls audit readiness financial accuracy collaborating AP AR tax procurement finance teams
The ideal candidate has 5+ years progressive accounting experience with at least 2 years supervisory managerial role. Strong working knowledge GAAP financial reporting internal controls proficiency ERP systems Excel skills supporting audits month-end cycles deadlines analytical organizational problem-solving skills high attention detail effective communicator collaboration departments levels organization demonstrated ability lead process improvements accounting automation initiatives.

job.title: Accountant
job.description:
Job Summary of Accountant:
Our store employees work many roles - from Accountant. As a store employee, you're also responsible for merchandising product, monitoring inventory and keeping the store looking its best. It's an opportunity to get more out of your career and grow in an exciting environment. Their hard work makes it possible to uphold our company philosophy, providing quality products at the best possible price. Their smiles and pleasant demeanors keep customers coming back time and time again.Our store employees are the face of the ALDI shopping experience.
Benefits of Accountant: • We offer a flexible schedule, • Insurance benefits • Fast paced exciting work place where you can refine your skills.
Responsibilities of Accountant: • Conducts customer transactions, fulfills general cleaning obligations, and arranges merchandise presentations and shelf restocking in an orderly fashion • Provide exceptional customer support by helping clients navigate their shopping journey • Work together with colleagues and maintain open communication with the store management group

job.title: Accounting Manager
job.description:
Accounting Manager
The Accounting Manager plays a key role in maintaining financial integrity and supporting operational scalability as the organization grows. This role is part of a global team working toward common goals at Atlantica.
Key Responsibilities: • Lead, supervise, and mentor accounting staff, providing guidance, training, performance feedback, and development support. This includes overseeing general ledger activities, • journals entries, • account reconciliations, , month-end close processes.As required by GAAP company policies and regulatory requirements ensure accurate timely financial reporting.
We believe in a culture of trust shared goals accountability.We operate with one mission no matter where you are based you are part of our team working towards the same goal.

job.title: Accounting Manager
job.description:
Accounting Manager
At Atlantica, we are seeking an experienced Accounting Manager to oversee core accounting operations and ensure accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting in support of renewable energy projects. Key Responsibilities:
Lead a team of accountants, providing guidance, training, performance feedback,and development support). Supervise general ledger activities,

job.title: Senior Accountant - Full-time
job.description:
Why Work For Us?
+ Great Pay - opportunity to participate in AAA discretionary annual incentive plan or other incentive plans depending upon position
+ 401k Matching – $1 for $1 company match up to 6% of eligible earnings per pay period
+ Benefits – Medical, Dental, Vision, wellness program and more!
+ Paid Holidays
+ Paid Time Off – Team Members accrue paid time off monthly. Depending on position, an additional 24 hours per year are earmarked for volunteer activities.
+ Collaborative Environment – AAA will value your contribution to providing exceptional service to our members
+ Free AAA Classic Membership
+ AAA Product Discounts
+ Tuition Reimbursement Program
.
At AAA, our Team Members strive to deliver amazing service and help our Members outsmart life’s roadblocks. We believe everything you do outside of work adds to who you are at work.
NOTE: This role is hybrid and requires 3 days a week onsite in our Phoenix office.
Job SummaryOur Senior Accountant is responsible for accounting functions to include the development and maintenance of accounting systems, general ledger, asset and liability records and other financial transactions, as well as the reporting of financial and statistical data. The ideal candidate uses advanced accounting concepts and company objectives to resolve complex issues in creative and effective ways.
Our Senior Accountant may function as a team lead and/or coordinate functions of others. They receive assignments in the form of goals and exercise considerable judgment and latitude in obtaining results. Interacts with all levels of staff and external constituents to resolve a wide variety of accounting related issues.Essential Functions• Develops implements and/or maintains one or a combination of general accounting systems.• Applies specialized accounting concepts to perform technical analyses to understand past performance and determine present and future performance and/or resource allocations.• Applies company policies and

job.title: Manager, Technical Accounting
job.description:
The Manager of Technical Accounting and SEC Reporting will be responsible for supporting the preparation of US GAAP financials, with anticipated Form 10-K/10-Q in the future. The Manager will collaborate closely across internal departments within Aledade to ensure accuracy, completeness and timeliness of reporting of Aledade's financial results. This should be aware of current activity of the FASB, SEC and other relevant authoritative bodies to support Aledade's accounting policies and financial statement disclosures while researching US GAAP, assisting in the documentation and accounting treatment conclusions for technical accounting matters including revenue recognition, share-based compensation and other complex accounting topics and non-routine areas. Coordination with various external consultants on a number of ongoing and future projects.
We are flexible with respect to geographic location, and the ideal candidate will be comfortable working remotely/work from home within the US or be based from Bethesda, MD office. Primary Duties: • Collaborate with Auditors to coordinate the quarterly reviews and the annual audit, and support reporting to the Executive Leadership Team, the Audit Committee of the Board of Directors and other operational leaders as needed • Perform technical accounting research, analysis, documentation, and enablement of significant or complex accounting matters • Support preparation of accounting entries for complex matters, including but not limited to revenue recognition, acquisition accounting and stock compensation expense • Ensure effective controls around the SEC reporting, internal reporting and technical accounting process, and assist in development of internal control framework across the business. • Develop strong cross-functional relationships and serve as a key business partner to ensure that all transactions are properly reflected in the financial statements Minimum Qualifications: • Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or

job.title: ACCOUNTING SPECIALIST MANAGER - 539102
job.description:
This job was posted by https://www.azjobconnection.gov : For more information, please see: https://www.azjobconnection.gov/jobs/7380101 **ACCOUNTING SPECIALIST MANAGER • 539102** Job Location: Arizona Correctional Industries (ACI)\ 4441 East McDowell Road\ Phoenix, Arizona 85008\
Salary: \$64,800.00 Grade: 21 Closing Date: 03/18/2026 Job Summary: Do you have at least 3 years of accounting experience in government, corrections, or an institutional environment? Are you a leader with experience in payroll systems, accounts receivable processes, and financial reporting? Join our energetic and diverse Arizona Correctional Industries (ACI) finance team. Apply today and make a difference!\ \ The Arizona Department of Corrections, Rehabilitation & Reentry (ADCRR) is looking for an accountant to join our team as the Accounting Specialist Manager. This position oversees key financial operations with a primary focus on inmate payroll administration, accounts receivable management, and daily accounting functions. Ensures accuracy in financial reporting, compliance with institutional policies, and timely processing of financial transactions. Also supervises accounting support staff, provides leadership, training, and performance oversight to maintain a high standard of accuracy, efficiency, and accountability.\ \ For further information about the Arizona Correctional Industries visit: https://aci.az.gov/ Job Duties: Inmate Payroll Management\ • Administers the full cycle of inmate payroll, including timecard collection, wage calculation, deductions, and disbursements\ • Ensures compliance with federal, state, and institutional regulations governing inmate compensation, maintains accurate payroll records, audits discrepancies, and resolves issues promptly\ • Coordinates with facility supervisors to verify work assignments, hours worked, and eligibility for pay\ • Prepares and distributes payroll reports for internal and external audits, ensuring payroll processes are accurate an

job.title: Travel Registered Nurse - ICU/CCU
job.description: Job Description:Supplemental Health Care is hiring Intensive Care Unit And Cardiac/coronary Care Unit Registered Nurses for travel-only contracts at a partnering hospital in Glendale, Arizona. With 40+ years of experience, we connect nurses to nationwide opportunities with competitive pay, benefits, and dedicated support. Please note - this contract is not available to Arizona residents.Qualifications:Active Compact State RN LicenseBLS certification required (AHA)Experience working in an acute care setting within the past 12 months as a Registered Nurse in the ICU/CCU areaAbility to pass a background check and meet credentialing requirementsAdditional experience/certifications may be requiredTravel RN contracts only, must not be an AZ residentTravel ICU/CCU Registered Nurse Contract Details:Compensation: $1,962 - $2,155 per week *estimateLocation: Glendale, ArizonaContract Length: 13 weeks, with potential for extensionSchedule: 36 hours per week | Every other weekendStart Date: Flexible, based on facility needResponsibilities:Assess, plan, implement, and evaluate patient care in accordance with the standards of professional Intensive Care Unit And Cardiac/coronary Care Unit nursing practiceProvide direct patient care, including medication administration and monitoringCollaborate with physicians, patients, and families to ensure continuity of careDocument all assessments, interventions, and patient responsesWhat We Offer:Full medical, dental, vision, life, and even pet insurance!Round the clock support. No matter where you are or what time it is, Supplemental Health Care is standing by.SHC's Share the Care referral program is the most dynamic, profitable referral program in the industry.401(k) Retirement Savings Program with a wide range of investment options.Discounted and free online access to CEU courses through Supplemental University.Apply online now for immediate consideration and connect with an SHC recruiter to take the next step in your travel nursing career

job.title: Registered Nurse - Cardiac Rehabilitation Unit
job.description:
Location Address:
1100 Central Avenue SE Albuquerque, NM 87106-4930
Compensation Pay Range:
Minimum Offer $37.80 Maximum Offer $51.00
Join Our Team! At Presbyterian, where your work truly matters, we are excited to welcome applicants for the RN position in our Cardiac Step Down unit. Whether you are a new graduate or an experienced Registered Nurse, we encourage you to apply!
New graduates can benefit from our mandatory residency program, featuring engaging monthly seminars led by our Nurse Residency Team, peer-to-peer debriefing sessions, and invaluable mentoring support. This program is designed to facilitate a smooth transition into your nursing career.
Your Growth Matters! We are committed to your professional development. We offer educational opportunities, career advancement options, tuition reimbursement, scholarship programs, and specialized training. You will also receive a staff safety badge for discreet emergency communication, malpractise liability insurance, and options for loan forgiveness through the New Mexico Higher Education Department.
Type of Opportunity: Full time FTE: 0.90 Job Exempt: No Work Shift: 12 Hour Nights (United States of America)
About the Role: In our 38-bed Cardiac Step Down unit, you will provide exceptional patient-focused care to those requiring telemetry monitoring and treatment for cardiovascular disorders, including cardiac arrhythmias and heart failure. You will care for patients recovering from myocardial infarctions, pacemaker implants, and other critical cardiovascular procedures, collaboratively working within an interdisciplinary team. Our unit, which accommodates approximately 50% progressive care patients, ensures comprehensive care throughout the inpatient stay, followed by personalized discharge planning to support outpatient needs.
Sign-On and Relocation Bonuses Available!
Qualifications: • Minimum Associate Degree from an accredited nursing program is preferred. • Current Registered Nurse license in New

job.title: Registered Nurse(RN) Behavioral Health
job.description:
Copper Springs East
Registered Nurse (RN), Behavioral Health
Full Time | 3x12 | Day Shift 7am-7pm
Your experience matters
Copper Springs - East is part of Lifepoint Health, a diversified healthcare delivery network with facilities coast to coast. We are driven by a profound commitment to prioritize your well-being so you can provide exceptional care to others. As a Registered Nurse (RN), joining our team, you're embracing a vital mission dedicated to making communities healthier ®. Join us on this meaningful journey where your skills, compassion and dedication will make a remarkable difference in the lives of those we serve.
More about our team
Copper Springs in Gilbert, Arizona, is a 96-bed behavioral health hospital. It offers both inpatient and outpatient programs for mental health and addition for adults, and seniors. The facility provides a range of treatments for mental health and addiction issues. Copper Spring is part of Lifepoint Health, a diversified healthcare delivery network committed to making communities healthier® with acute care, rehabilitation, and behavioral health facilities from coast to coast. From your first day to your next career milestone-your experience matters.
How you'll contribute
A Behavioral Health RN who excels in this role: • Will assess the patient and plan care within set timeframes and document findings according to policies • Will monitor patient for change of condition and respond accordingly up to and including notification of the physician • RN will follow hospital policy for medication administration • RN will consistently use empathy, dignity, and respect when interacting with patients • Delivery of quality nursing care to ensure that goals of the treatment plan are properly executed following hospital policies and procedures and demonstrated nursing competencies • Assists/performs comprehensive nursing assessments on all patients
Why join us
We believe that investing in our employees is the first step to providin

job.title: Registered Nurse - Up to $38,000 Sign-on Bonus
job.description:
Summary Corrections professionals who foster a humane and secure environment and ensure public safety by preparing individuals for successful reentry into our communities.
Duties
Registered Nurse provides direct patient care services in accordance with legal, ethical and institution standards. Provides nursing care of a general nature to inmates in the institution hospital/clinic, and may be provided to patients in specific areas, e.g., psychiatric, operating room, orthopedics, geriatrics, etc. Develops a nursing assessment for each patient, to include planning, implementing, and evaluating nursing care. May assess and identify high risk symptoms/behaviors in patients, to include suicidal risk, homicidal risk and risk for verbal and/or physical abuse. Completes nutritional screening as part of the assessment and refers patient to a dietitian for a nutritional assessment if necessary. Monitors, evaluates and revises the plan of care as needed. May also assess and document the discharge planning needs of a patient. Delegates and coordinates care based on assessments. Along with all other correctional institution employees, incumbent is charged with responsibility for maintaining security of the institution. The staff correctional responsibilities precede all others required by this position and is performed on a regular and recurring basis.

job.title: Registered Nurse - Emergency Department
job.description:
Location Address:
1010 Spruce Street, Espanola, NM 87532-2724
Compensation Pay Range:
Minimum Offer $37.80 Maximum Offer $51.00
Summary:
As a vital member of our healthcare team, you will utilize the nursing process to provide exceptional direct patient care. You will prioritize and efficiently deliver nursing care to an assigned group of patients during your shift, integrating a standards-based framework model.
Why Join Us? • Opportunities for professional growth, including tuition and certification reimbursement and scholarship options. • Staff Safety feature: a wearable badge for discreetly calling for help when necessary. • Incentives for night/weekend shifts, higher education, certifications, and various leadership roles. • Malpractice liability insurance provided. • Loan forgiveness opportunities through the New Mexico Higher Education Department. • Utilization of EPIC electronic charting system.
Job Details:
Type of Opportunity: Full time FTE: 0.90 Job Exempt: No Work Shift: Varied Days and Hours (United States of America)
Key Responsibilities: • Provide direct patient care by assessing, planning, executing, evaluating, and documenting patient needs and responses. • Collaborate with patients, families, and the healthcare team to coordinate care. • Conduct assessments in line with unit standards; document accordingly. • Administer medications and treatments as ordered, following policies and protocols. • Recognize and address patient and family education needs throughout the care process. • Demonstrate competence in emergency situations and delegate patient care tasks appropriately. • Supervise LPNs and non-licensed personnel, providing guidance and leadership. • Participate in the orientation of new staff and serve as a professional role model. • Contribute to quality improvement initiatives and maintain positive communication with all team members.
Qualifications: • Current nursing license in the State of New Mexico or Compact State Nursing License

job.title: Registered Nurse(RN) Behavioral Health
job.description:
Copper Springs East
Registered Nurse (RN), Behavioral Health
Full Time | 3x12 | Day Shift 7am-7pm
Your experience matters
Copper Springs - East is part of Lifepoint Health, a diversified healthcare delivery network with facilities coast to coast. We are driven by a profound commitment to prioritize your well-being so you can provide exceptional care to others. As a Registered Nurse (RN), joining our team, you're embracing a vital mission dedicated to making communities healthier ®. Join us on this meaningful journey where your skills, compassion and dedication will make a remarkable difference in the lives of those we serve.
More about our team
Copper Springs in Gilbert, Arizona, is a 96-bed behavioral health hospital. It offers both inpatient and outpatient programs for mental health and addition for adults, and seniors. The facility provides a range of treatments for mental health and addiction issues. Copper Spring is part of Lifepoint Health, a diversified healthcare delivery network committed to making communities healthier® with acute care, rehabilitation, and behavioral health facilities from coast to coast. From your first day to your next career milestone-your experience matters.
How you'll contribute
A Behavioral Health RN who excels in this role: • Will assess the patient and plan care within set timeframes and document findings according to policies • Will monitor patient for change of condition and respond accordingly up to and including notification of the physician • RN will follow hospital policy for medication administration • RN will consistently use empathy, dignity, and respect when interacting with patients • Delivery of quality nursing care to ensure that goals of the treatment plan are properly executed following hospital policies and procedures and demonstrated nursing competencies • Assists/performs comprehensive nursing assessments on all patients
Why join us
We believe that investing in our employees is the first step to providin

job.title: RN, Neuro Step Down
job.description:
Location Address:1100 Central Avenue SE Albuquerque, NM 87106-4930
Compensation Pay Range:Minimum Offer $37.80 Maximum Offer $51.00
Summary:Love where you work . Our Neuro Step Down unit is hiring an RN looking to specialize in Neuro.
We welcome applications from both new graduates and experienced RNs! New graduates have the opportunity to participate in our mandatory residency program, which includes monthly seminars led by the Nurse Residency Team, peer-to-peer debriefing sessions, support groups/mentoring, and rounding. The Nurse Residency Program is an added benefit designed to support your transition into practice
How you grow, learn and thrive matters here. Educational and career development options, including tuition and certification reimbursement, scholarship opportunities Staff Safety (a wearable badge that allows nurses to quickly and discreetly call for help when safety is a concern) Differentials for night/weekend shifts, higher education, certifications and various lead roles (for eligible positions) Malpractice liability insurance Loan forgiveness through the New Mexico Higher Education Department EPIC electronic charting system Type of Opportunity: Full time FTE: 0.90 Job Exempt: No Work Shift: 12 Hour Nights (United States of America)
Responsibilities:
The Neuro Step Down Unit is hiring a nurse (RN) to join their dedicated team of high-performing nurses that provide exceptional patient care within their 29-bed unit. This unit is highly specialized neurology Step-Down, dedicated to the special care required for patients who are recovering from neurosurgery, or neurological injuries - to include psych patients. Joint Commission-Accredited Primary Step-Down.
Qualifications: • Minimum Associate Degree: Degree from accredited academic nursing program preferred • Registered Nurse-NM License • State of New Mexico or Compact State Nursing License Academic Preparation: • BLS certification REQUIRED at time of hire.
We're all about well-being, starting

job.title: Long Term Acute Care Registered Nurse
job.description: Job Description:Supplemental Health Care is hiring Long Term Acute Care Registered Nurses for contract assignments at a partnering Rehab facility in Scottsdale, Arizona.Whether you're looking to travel or stay local, we're committed to helping Long Term Acute Care RNs find the right fit with top healthcare facilities across the country. With more than 40 years of experience in healthcare staffing, Supplemental Health Care offers reliable support, competitive pay, and great benefits every step of the way.Qualifications:Current Arizona Nursing LicenseAmerican Heart Association BLS2 years of recent relevant nursing experienceLong Term Acute Care RN Contract Details:$1,548 - $1,697 per week*13-week contract with possibility of extensionConsult and coordinate with facility health care team members to assess, plan, implement and evaluate patient care plansAdminister and record prescribed medicationsReport adverse reactions to medications or treatments*Estimated weekly payment may include both taxable wages and tax-free reimbursements for meals, housing, and incidentals. Please speak with a recruiter for details.Apply today to get started with this Long Term Acute Care RN contract opportunity, or talk to our team about the full range of Nursing opportunities available.What We Offer:Full medical, dental, vision, life, and even pet insurance!Round the clock support. No matter where you are or what time it is, Supplemental Health Care is standing by.SHC's Share the Care referral program is the most dynamic, profitable referral program in the industry.401(k) Retirement Savings Program with a wide range of investment options.Discounted and free online access to CEU courses through Supplemental University.Supplemental Health Care is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All candidates, including veterans and those with disabilities, are encouraged to apply. SHC will consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with the requirements of appl

job.title: Registered Nurse - Observation Unit - RN
job.description:
Why Mayo Clinic
Mayo Clinic is top-ranked in more specialties than any other care provider according to U.S. News & World Report. As we work together to put the needs of the patient first, we are also dedicated to our employees, investing in competitive compensation and comprehensive benefit plans – to take care of you and your family, now and in the future. And with continuing education and advancement opportunities at every turn, you can build a long, successful career with Mayo Clinic.
Benefits Highlights • Medical: Multiple plan options. • Dental: Delta Dental or reimbursement account for flexible coverage. • Vision: Affordable plan with national network. • Pre-Tax Savings: HSA and FSAs for eligible expenses. • Retirement: Competitive retirement package to secure your future.
Responsibilities
The registered nurse (RN) is accountable for the coordination of nursing care, including direct patient care, patient/family education and transitions of care. The RN supports professional nursing practice across practice settings and across the continuum of care to meet the needs of the patient and family. The RN will function within the Mayo Clinic Nursing Professional Practice Model, which includes accountability for planning, implementing, evaluating and communicating all phases of nursing care for assigned patients. The ANA Nursing: Scope and Standards of Practice provide a basis for the practice of the RN. The RN provides leadership through activities such as preceptor role, informal and formal leadership roles, and quality improvement efforts. The RN delegates patient care according to skill level, experience, patient acuity, fiscal accountability and availability of resources. The RN possesses excellent communication skills; is skillful in mentoring and teaching; and may participate on committees or projects. A subset of employees may be required to drive their personal vehicle as a part of the responsibility of their role.
This role is eligible for TN sponsors

job.title: Operating Room Registered Nurse PRN
job.description:
Location Address: 2400 Unser Blvd Rio Rancho, NM 87124
Compensation Pay Range: Minimum Offer $41.58 Maximum Offer $56.10
Summary: Join the dynamic surgical services team at Rust Medical Center as an Experienced Registered Nurse (RN) in the Operating Room. We are seeking dedicated professionals who are passionate about patient care and eager to make a difference in our community.
Why Choose Us? We prioritize your growth and development through educational opportunities, tuition reimbursement, and scholarships. Enjoy a safe work environment with innovative tools, such as a wearable safety badge for nurses. Benefit from additional compensation for night/weekend shifts and higher education. Plus, enjoy malpractice liability insurance and potential loan forgiveness through the New Mexico Higher Education Department.
Type of Opportunity: PRN FTE: 0.00 Job Exempt: No Work Shift: Varied Days and Hours (United States of America)
Your Responsibilities: • Provide direct patient care by assessing, planning, implementing, evaluating, and documenting individual patient needs... • Coordinate patient care through collaboration with the patient/family and the healthcare team... • Perform assessments per unit standards and document appropriately... • Administer medications and treatments as prescribed or according to protocols... • Identify and support patient and family learning and discharge needs... • Evaluate patient progression toward outcomes and document effectively... • Demonstrate competence in clinical emergency situations... • Delegate tasks to healthcare team members according to their competency... • Assist with various procedures, treatments, and surgical techniques... • Support and guide new staff or students as a resource and role model... • Embrace and incorporate our mission in your caregiving activities... • Exhibit flexibility by supporting patient care in other departments as needed... • Assume leadership roles, such as relief charge nurse, as required... •

job.title: ICU RN
job.description:
Job #1883812
Glendale, AZ
$1979-2106 /week*
36 hrs /week • Estimated payments include wages and expense reimbursement, are based on information available to Fusion at time of posting, and could vary depending on factors related to the facility or applicant. Estimated payments do not include taxes, insurance, or other deductions that may occur.
Apply for this job
Job overview
Start date
03/30/2026
Assignment length
13 weeks
Shift
Days
Hours
3 X 12
Facility details
Work setting
Hospital
Number of beds
539
Trauma center
Level II
Charting system
Babyscripts, Buoy Health (Symptom Checker), Cerner (Millennium, PowerChart), Epic, FUJIFILM (Synapse)
Job Details
Fusion Medical Staffing is seeking a ICU RN for a 13-week travel assignment in Glendale, Arizona. As a member of our team, you'll have the opportunity to make a positive impact on the lives of patients while enjoying competitive pay, comprehensive benefits, and the support of a dedicated clinical team.
Required Qualifications: • One year of recent experience as an ICU RN • Valid RN license in compliance with state regulations • Current BLS (AHA/ARC) and ACLS (AHA/ARC) certifications Preferred Qualifications: • Critical Care Registered Nurse (CCRN) certification • TNCC, NIHSS certification • Other certifications or licenses may be required for this position Summary:
The ICU Registered Nurse is responsible for providing comprehensive, critical care to patients in the intensive care unit. This role encompasses assessing and monitoring critically ill patients, operating life-support equipment, administering advanced treatments, and collaborating with multidisciplinary healthcare teams. The position requires strong critical care skills, advanced clinical judgment, excellent communication, and a commitment to maintaining the highest standards of patient safety and professional ethics in high-acuity settings.
Essential Work Functions: • Assess and monitor critically ill patients, recognizing and r

job.title: Registered Nurse RN Emergency Department - Full-time
job.description:
**Primary City/State:**
Queen Creek, Arizona • *Department Name:**
Emergency Ctr-Hosp • *Work Shift:**
Evening • *Job Category:**
Nursing
The future is full of possibilities. At Banner Health, we’re excited about what the future holds for health care. That’s why we’re changing the industry to make the experience the best it can be. If you’re ready to change lives, we want to hear from you. • *Banner Ironwood Medical Center** resides in the heart of San Tan Valley serving Queen Creek, Florence, San Tan Valley, and other neighboring communities. Since opening in 2010, Banner Ironwood Medical Center has provided an excellent patient experience, with all the amenities of a hotel and the highest quality of health care available. Our thirty-four bed Emergency Department serves both adult and pediatric patients with ACEP board certified physicians capable of managing complex and simple health care emergencies. Patients can count on collaboration and innovation in processes with the use of technologies foundational to Banner’s ability to provide industry leading care. We hold the State of Arizona designation as a Level IV Trauma Center and the Arizona Chapter American Academy Pediatrics designation as Pediatric Prepared. We have a new twelve bed Pediatric Inpatient Unit and Adult Critical Care Unit offering a healing environment designed to enhance outcomes, healing, and patient safety.
As a **Registered Nurse in our Emergency Department** , you are a vital member of the multi-professional care team, we strive to advance the art and science of patient care, quality, and safety. If you are looking to work with all patients and a wide range of patient acuity levels, this is the position for you. **This is a full-time mid shift position working three 12-hour shifts per week from 3:00 PM - 3:30 AM. You will also have the opportunity utilize our self-scheduling tool for shift and weekend coverage. Enjoy an 18%-night shift differential and a flat rate $3/hour weekend sh

job.title: Local Contract Nurse RN - PICU - Pediatric Intensive Care - $66-68 per hour
job.description:
LanceSoft is seeking a local contract nurse RN PICU - Pediatric Intensive Care for a local contract nursing job in Phoenix, Arizona. Job Description & Requirements • Specialty: PICU - Pediatric Intensive Care • Discipline: RN • Start Date: 04/06/2026 • Duration: 13 weeks • 36 hours per week • Shift: 12 hours • Employment Type: Local Contract
Travel RN Opportunity – Pediatric ICU Float Pool 🚨
🏥 Facility: Phoenix Children's Hospital 📍 Location: Phoenix, Arizona
Position: Registered Nurse – Pediatric Critical Care (Float Pool) 🕒 Shift: Night Shift | 3x12s (7:00 PM – 7:30 AM)
Float Units: PICU | CVICU | NICU (Main Campus & Arrowhead Location)
Requirements: ✔ 2+ years Pediatric Critical Care RN experience ✔ AZ RN License or Compact License ✔ BLS, PALS, and NRP (AHA) ✔ Children’s hospital experience preferred
📌 Schedule: Every other weekend required
About LanceSoft
Established in 2000, LanceSoft is a Certified MBE and Woman-Owned organization. Lancesoft Inc. is one of the highest rated companies in the industry. We have been recognized as one of the Largest Staffing firms and ranked in the top 50 fastest Growing Healthcare Staffing firms in 2022. Lancesoft offers short- and long-term contracts, permanent placements, and travel opportunities to credentialed and experienced professionals throughout the United States. We pride ourselves on having industry leading benefits. We understand the importance of partnering with an expert who values your needs, which is why we’re 100% committed to finding you an assignment that best matches your career and lifestyle goals. Our team of experienced career specialists takes the time to understand your needs and match you with the right job Lancesoft has been chosen by Staffing Industry Analysts as one of the Best Staffing Firms to Work for.LanceSoft specializes in providing Registered Nurses, Nurse Practitioners, LPNs/LVNs, Social Workers, Medical Assistants, and Certified Nursing Assistants to work in Acute Care Centers, Skille

job.title: Registered Nurse - Cardiac Recovery Unit
job.description:
Location Address:
1100 Central Avenue SE Albuquerque, NM 87106-4930
Compensation Pay Range:
Minimum Offer $37.80 Maximum Offer $51.00
Summary:
Join our dedicated team at Presbyterian as an RN in the Cardiac Recovery Unit, where the care you provide matters. We are excited to welcome both new graduates and seasoned RNs! New graduates can take advantage of our comprehensive residency program, including monthly seminars, peer support sessions, and mentorship opportunities. This program is specifically designed to foster your growth and transition into practice.
Here, your growth and well-being are our priorities. Enjoy numerous educational and career development options, such as tuition and certification reimbursement, scholarship opportunities, and staff safety measures that enhance your work environment. Also available are differentials for night/weekend shifts, higher education, and certifications, along with malpractice liability insurance. Benefit from loan forgiveness options through the New Mexico Higher Education Department and utilize our EPIC electronic charting system.
Type of Opportunity: Full time FTE: 0.90 Job Exempt: No Work Shift: 12 Hour Nights (United States of America)
Responsibilities:
The Cardiac Recovery Unit is a 38-bed unit dedicated to providing the highest level of patient care for those requiring telemetry monitoring due to cardiovascular issues such as cardiac arrhythmias and heart failure. Our team cares for patients recovering from myocardial infarctions, coronary procedures, pacemaker placements, and electrophysiology interventions. With approximately 50% of our patients needing progressive care, we deliver quality care through a collaborative approach and create personalized discharge plans to meet outpatient needs.
Sign-on and relocation bonuses are available for qualified candidates.
Qualifications: • Minimum Associate Degree: Degree from an accredited academic nursing program preferred • Credentials: Registered Nurse-NM, St

job.title: Registered Nurse - Case Manager Inpatient - RN - ED/OBS/ACH
job.description:
Why Mayo Clinic
Mayo Clinic is top-ranked in more specialties than any other care provider according to U.S. News & World Report. As we work together to put the needs of the patient first, we are also dedicated to our employees, investing in competitive compensation and comprehensive benefit plans – to take care of you and your family, now and in the future. And with continuing education and advancement opportunities at every turn, you can build a long, successful career with Mayo Clinic.
Benefits Highlights • Medical: Multiple plan options. • Dental: Delta Dental or reimbursement account for flexible coverage. • Vision: Affordable plan with national network. • Pre-Tax Savings: HSA and FSAs for eligible expenses. • Retirement: Competitive retirement package to secure your future.
Responsibilities
The Registered Nurse (RN) Case Manager works within an interdisciplinary team to facilitate the patient plan of care throughout the continuum of care by ensuring appropriate utilization management, care coordination, resource utilization, and clinical documentation. The RN Case Manager will function within the Mayo Clinical Nursing Professional Practice Model, which includes accountability for assessing, planning, implementing, evaluating, and communicating the patient care plan progression. The RN Case Manager utilizes the principles of mutual respect, patient/family advocacy and provides leadership within the team of internal partners and outside agencies to facilitate best practices that achieve quality clinical, financial, and patient satisfaction outcomes. The RN Case Manager provides leadership through education on case management/utilization management concepts, committee work, research, and community involvement. The RN Case Manager bridges communication between providers, patients and families, members of the interdisciplinary team, and outside agencies to assure high-quality care that meets the patient's needs and is delivered in a cost-effective and timely ma

job.title: Travel Nurse - RN - Cardiac Cath Lab - Competitive Weekly Pay
job.description:
Host Healthcare is seeking an experienced Cardiac Cath Lab Registered Nurse for an exciting Travel Nursing job in Glendale, AZ. Shift: Inquire Start Date: 03/30/2026 Duration: 13 weeks Pay: $2136.6 / Week About Host Healthcare:
At Host Healthcare, we are dedicated to empowering the life and healthcare career you deserve. As a nurse, allied, or therapy professional, you will be matched to one of our responsive recruiters who will have your back throughout your journey. You will also be connected with a full support team that was rated #1 in Nursing Satisfaction by MIT Sloan Management Review.
No matter if you want to explore the other side of the country or stay close to home, our team can help you get there. With Host Healthcare, you'll get exclusive access to thousands of jobs in all 50 states. This means you get priority access to apply to travel and local assignments before other applicants.
We know that you are so much more than a number and we work hard to ensure you have the best benefits for you and your loved ones. During your assignment, you'll be able to select premium benefits like Day-1 health coverage, 401K matching, travel reimbursements, housing support and more.
Take control of your life and career with Host Healthcare.
Benefits: • A dedicated and responsive recruiter who has your back • Priority access to jobs in all 50 states at every major healthcare system • Day-1 medical benefits that last up to 30 days between assignments • Day-1 401K with company matching after 6 months • 24/7 support • Clinical support throughout your assignment

job.title: $1,727 per week for Travel Nurse RN - Telemetry in Chandler, AZ
job.description:
Start Date: ASAP
Shift: 3x12
GQR Healthcare is representing a well-known health system seeking experienced Telemetry providers to add to their team. If you are passionate about providing exceptional care and looking to explore a rewarding career opportunity, we'd love to hear from you!
Apply now, and a dedicated GQR consultant will connect with you to discuss the role, answer your questions, and guide you through the process.
About GQR Healthcare:
At GQR Healthcare, we are committed to supporting healthcare professionals at every stage of their careers. When you partner with us, you gain access to a wide range of benefits and support, including: • Day 1 Benefits: Enjoy comprehensive healthcare coverage, including medical, dental, and vision plans, starting on your first day. • Guaranteed Hours: We provide contract stability by offering guaranteed hours, ensuring you have the predictability you need. • Continuing Education & Development: We invest in your growth by offering opportunities for professional development and ongoing education. • 24/7 Consultant Support: Our dedicated consultants are available around the clock to assist with any needs or questions you have. • Seamless Placement Process: We handle all the details, from onboarding to interviews, so you can focus on what you do best - providing exceptional patient care.
Partnering with GQR means more than just finding your next job - it's about building a meaningful career with a team that truly supports your goals.

job.title: Travel Nurse RN - Telemetry - $2,027 per week
job.description:
AMN Healthcare Nursing is seeking a travel nurse RN Telemetry for a travel nursing job in CHANDLER, Arizona. Job Description & Requirements • Specialty: Telemetry • Discipline: RN • Start Date: ASAP • Duration: 13 weeks • 36 hours per week • Shift: 12 hours, nights • Employment Type: Travel
Job Description & Requirements
Registered Nurse – Telemetry - Travel - (Tele RN)
StartDate: 2/23/2026 Available Shifts: 12 N Pay Rate: $1966.00 - $2088.00
Since 1961, Dignity Health Chandler Regional Medical Center has been at the heart of the health and well-being of our community.
Its humble beginnings as a true community hospital, which opened with only 40 beds, 25 employees and 91 volunteers, laid the foundation for the full-service, acute-care hospital it has become.
Today, Chandler Regional is a 429-bed, non-profit hospital with more than 2,600 employees, and more than 1,100 doctors on staff representing all major specialties.
Required Qualifications Registered Nurse, Telemetry Experience: 2 years Licenses: RN(Compact Accepted)(Copy needed) Certifications: ACLS(Copy Needed); BLS(Copy Needed); CERT-NIH Stroke Scale(Copy Needed) SSN Required DOB Required References: 2 References in entire work history
ACLS BLS NIHSS
Facility Location
Job Benefits
At AMN Healthcare we take care of our travelers! We offer: • Competitive pay rates • Free, quality, private housing • Medical, Dental, Vision • 401(k) and Flex Spending • Life Insurance • Accident and Short-term Disability Coverage • Free Continuing Education • Refer a friend and earn extra cash!
About the Company
At AMN Healthcare, we strive to be recognized as the most trusted, innovative, and influential force in helping healthcare organizations provide quality patient care that continually evolves to make healthcare more human, more effective, and more achievable.
Telemetry nurse, telemetry, nurse, nursing, RN, R.N., registered nurse, hospital, medical, healthcare, health care, patient care, tele RN
